ink-black.$description: Ink Black — Dark supporting neutral for text, icons, and strong contrast. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

paper.$description: Paper — Sidebar background, page canvas — the slightly cooler off-white that separates the nav rail from the main stage

snow.$description: Snow — Main content surface, input field background, card surfaces — the brighter white where the user's attention belongs

smoke.$description: Smoke — Tertiary text, subdued helper copy, subtle shadow tint — secondary to Ink Black

ash.$description: Ash — Placeholder text, inactive icons, secondary nav, muted meta — the quietest visible gray

fog.$description: Fog — Light supporting surface for subtle backgrounds and section separation. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

ui-sans-serif.$description: All UI text — sidebar nav at 14px/400, buttons and body at 16px/400-500, nav emphasis at 16px/500, the empty-state question at 24px/400. System stack only; no webfont loads for content text, which keeps the interface fast and platform-native.

openai-sans.$description: Brand wordmark 'ChatGPT' in the header only — the single branded typography moment on the page. Tight tracking (-0.015em) and weight 600 give it a compact, confident mark that contrasts with the regular-weight system sans surrounding it.

sidebar-rail.$description: Surface level 0: Left navigation panel, always visible, slightly cooler than the main canvas to create separation without a border

main-stage.$description: Surface level 1: Primary content area, the bright surface where the prompt input and responses appear

input-field.$description: Surface level 2: Rounded prompt input — the focal object on the page, distinguished only by its 10px radius and 1px Fog border

filled-control.$description: Surface level 3: Log in button, Voice button — dark filled surfaces that invert the page polarity to signal action
